markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To explore GrowthX's AI-driven content services for scaling Spendesk's marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Spendesk's Challenge:** A slow design agency and a small content team limit output to \~1 blog/week, creating a bottleneck for rapid-fire campaigns and competitive visuals.](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Solution:** An AI-powered service (not a self-serve platform) that combines sophisticated workflows with human oversight to produce 5 high-quality, SEO-optimized articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [**Phased Approach:** GrowthX starts with blog content to build domain expertise, then expands to premium assets (e.g., ebooks) after \~6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [**Pricing:** A $30k strategy sprint to establish workflows, followed by a $15k/month retainer for execution.](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

## Topics

### Spendesk's Content Bottleneck

  - [**Primary Pain Point:** A slow design agency blocks rapid-fire creative needs for ads and campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [**Content Production:**](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
      - [**Current Output:** \~1 blog/week (2 at a push).](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
      - [**Constraint:** The 3-person team is pulled into other tasks (translations, emails, landing pages), limiting time for blog creation.](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [**Current AI Tool (Dust):**](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [Effective for generating content from internal data (e.g., Notion).](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [Ineffective for net-new topics (e.g., e-invoicing), requiring heavy fact-checking and risking AI "hallucinations."](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [**Language Needs:** English, French, German, and Spain-Spanish.](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
      - [**Process:** AI-translate English drafts → native team sense-check/localize.](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Human Content Engine

  - [**Model:** A managed service, not a self-serve platform.](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
  - [**Core Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
      - [**1. Strategy Sprint (8 weeks, $30k):**](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
          - [Defines keywords, topic clusters, and competitor analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
          - [Creates "artifacts" (e.g., detailed persona profiles) to provide context for AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**2. Growth Execution (12 months, $15k/month):**](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
          - [**Output:** 5 articles/week (editorial or programmatic).](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
          - [**Process:** AI-driven research and drafting, with human editors for review, fact-checking, and final edits.](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
          - [**Rationale:** This human-in-the-loop model prevents the "obviously AI-written" quality issues that Google's algorithm punishes.](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [**Client Examples:**](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
      - [**Ramp:** Started with blog content, then expanded to programmatic assets like a vendor directory and comparison pages.](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
      - [**Augment Code:** Achieved 3-5x organic traffic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)

### Partnership Structure & Pricing

  - [**Phased Approach:**](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (First \~6 months):** Focus on blog content to build domain expertise and SEO authority.](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (Post-6 months):** Expand to premium assets (e.g., ebooks, guides).](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [**Pricing:**](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [**Strategy Sprint:** $30,000](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [**Growth Execution:** $15,000/month for 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/yuT7j_RSyikdKccW6QUwPQtXicqqn4xs?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
